headline: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Stock Has Cash Flow Upside While Earnings Look Fair
summary: Ulta Beauty stock has fallen away from its recent highs and is now trading at a level where the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate points to meaningful upside, while the broader valuation checks suggest only a mixed picture rather than a clear bargain. Over the past 5 years, Ulta Beauty has delivered a total return of 37.6%, which puts the recent share price weakness into the context of a longer period of positive performance. headline: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Launches Bath And Body Works In More Than 600 Stores
summary: Ulta Beauty and Bath & Body Works are rolling out over 600 in-store and online Bath & Body Works product areas at Ulta Beauty locations. The partnership includes Ulta exclusive products and comes as Ulta’s collaboration with Target approaches its planned end. This move reshapes Ulta Beauty’s in-store product mix and cross-brand strategy during a period of shifting retail alliances. Ulta Beauty (NasdaqGS:ULTA) is adjusting its retail partnerships at a time when the stock has faced pressure,...

headline: Inside Cannes: What Executives Said About Leading in the AI Era
summary: Executives across multiple industries joined the WSJ Leadership Institute at the Cannes Lions festival to explore how artificial intelligence is reshaping the corporate landscape and transforming how they lead their companies.
